preconditions.provenance: range must be non-empty for increment to be well-defined

postconditions.provenance: result stays within range lower bound
result stays within range upper bound; mutant M3 (val >= hi → val > hi) killed
monotonicity: increment never decreases; mutant M6 (val+1 → val-1) killed
increment by at most 1; mutant M5 (val+1 → val+0) killed
